project_identity.name: BuildContextMemory
project_identity.description: A lightweight system that preserves project memory and AI behavior consistency across sessions and tools.
project_identity.architecture_summary: Two-file system: AI_Starter.md defines AI behavior; Build-Context-Memory.json stores append-only project/session memory.

hackathon_metadata.name: DSN x BCT LLM Agent Challenge 3.0
hackathon_metadata.team_eligibility: All members must be enrolled students (Undergraduate, Postgraduate, PhD)

task_a_user_modeling.description: Build an agent that simulates user reviews — capturing tone, rating behavior, and contextual nuance
task_a_user_modeling.output: Predicted star rating (1-5) + written review in user's voice

task_b_recommendation.description: Build an agent that delivers personalized recommendations beyond collaborative filtering to contextual, conversational retrieval
task_b_recommendation.output: Top-10 ranked personalized recommendations with reasoning
task_b_recommendation.nigerian_bonus: Additional marks for agents that behave and sound like Nigerians

deliverable_1_containerized_app.endpoint_task_a: POST /v1/simulate-review — takes user persona + item → returns rating + review
deliverable_1_containerized_app.endpoint_task_b: POST /v1/recommend — takes user persona → returns ranked recommendations

contents: What could be done with more time
Actual evaluation numbers from working system
deliverable_2_solution_paper.importance: Judges read this FIRST — it is the primary talent signal. Originality and clarity rewarded above raw performance.

requirements: Bonus credit for exceptional README and modular design

single_brain_two_outputs.concept: Shared User Simulation Engine powers both Task A and Task B
single_brain_two_outputs.advantage: Other teams build two separate systems. We build one unified agentic brain.
single_brain_two_outputs.flow: Simulation Engine → Task A (review generation) + Task B (recommendation ranking)

agentic_loop_pattern.description: Explicit agentic stages that align orchestrator with hackathon scoring expectations for explainability and flow reasoning
agentic_loop_pattern.implementation: orchestrator/pipeline.py structures ArchePipeline methods around distinct loop stages

nigerian_context_strategy.approach: Dataset-Driven Behavioral Learning + Prompt Calibration + Few-Shot Examples
nigerian_context_strategy.layer_1: Real Nigerian behavioral data extracted from Yelp dataset → builds accurate Nigerian behavioral cohort priors
nigerian_context_strategy.layer_2: Nigerian few-shot review examples extracted from real data → injected into LLM prompts as concrete style anchors
nigerian_context_strategy.layer_3: Nigerian cultural context calibration in system prompts → time patterns, price sensitivity, language register
nigerian_context_strategy.principle: Behavioral signals are universal. Cultural calibration is a layer on top.

behavioral_components.review_generation_agent: Generates rating prediction + review text grounded in behavioral snapshot
behavioral_components.recommendation_agent: Ranks candidates using LLM-based scoring with deterministic re-ranking fallback
behavioral_components.simulation_engine: Central LLM helper with no token limits — caller responsible for management

gap_resolutions.eligibility: ✅ All team members confirmed as enrolled students
gap_resolutions.two_tasks_required: ✅ ReviewGenerationAgent added for Task A; single architecture powers both
gap_resolutions.real_datasets: ✅ Yelp Open Dataset (food domain, rich review text, Nigerian relevance)
gap_resolutions.docker_containerization: ✅ Entire app runs with docker-compose up
gap_resolutions.solution_paper: ✅ Formal deliverable written Days 15-17 with real evaluation numbers
gap_resolutions.nigerian_contextualization: ✅ Behavioral signal extraction + prompt calibration + few-shot examples

arche_hackalign_md.purpose: Single source of truth for ARCHE alignment with hackathon brief, gap resolutions, Nigerian context strategy
arche_hackalign_md.contents: Official brief alignment, gap analysis, Nigerian/global context modeling, prompt calibration examples, submission checklist

arche_copilot_alignment_prompt_md.purpose: Day-by-day copilot instructions — what exists, what must not change, what to build next, priority order
arche_copilot_alignment_prompt_md.contents: Locked components, current build status, next steps, priority checklist, submission requirements

arche_dataset_pipeline_prompt_md.purpose: Data pipeline setup and Yelp dataset ingestion strategy
arche_dataset_pipeline_prompt_md.contents: Yelp dataset download, preprocessing, Nigerian user extraction, few-shot example collection

arche_build_clarity_prompt_md.purpose: Clarity and architectural refinement notes for ongoing development
arche_build_clarity_prompt_md.contents: Build milestones, clarity on requirements, architectural decisions, debugging guidance

CI workflow references tests/integration/ path that does not exist in repository

critical_fixes.root_cause: Persistence code was after the return statement
critical_fixes.fix_applied: Moved persistence logic before return statement, ensuring last_recommend.json updates on every recommendation

critical_fixes.root_cause: Tests expected 'cold_start_prior' and 'warm_start_memory' but API returns 'historical_memory:<n>' format; also returned 'adjacent_exploration' type not covered
critical_fixes.fix_applied: Updated assertion to handle both formats and include 'adjacent_exploration' recommendation type

critical_fixes.defect: CI workflow referenced non-existent tests/integration/ path
critical_fixes.root_cause: Path mismatch between workflow and actual test file location
critical_fixes.fix_applied: Changed path from tests/integration/ to tests/test_integration.py

critical_fixes.root_cause: Errors weren't converted to proper HTTP responses via FastAPI's HTTPException
critical_fixes.fix_applied: Converted ValueError exceptions to HTTPException with appropriate status codes (404)

critical_fixes.defect: Duplicate session IDs in memory log
critical_fixes.root_cause: Copy-paste error when appending performance testing session

failed_reasons: Cold-start latency test threshold too aggressive (183ms vs 100ms target - not critical for demo)

decisions_log.decision: Convert ValueError to HTTPException in explain endpoint
decisions_log.reason: Allows FastAPI to properly serialize error responses with appropriate HTTP status codes
decisions_log.alternatives_considered: Leave as ValueError (causes 500); catch and return dict (less idiomatic)

decisions_log.decision: Include 'adjacent_exploration' in recommendation_type validation
decisions_log.reason: API design includes this type for exploration near user affinities; test assertion must match
decisions_log.alternatives_considered: Change API to only use 'exploration' (reduces precision of recommendations)

decisions_log.decision: Persist latest recommendation through a helper instead of direct Path.write_text in the orchestrator
decisions_log.reason: Windows intermittently denied writes to data/last_recommend.json during tests; the helper preserves explainability through an in-memory fallback while still writing the artifact when possible.
decisions_log.alternatives_considered: Disable persistence; write only per-user files; keep direct writes and require manual file permission cleanup

decisions_log.decision: Do not eagerly seed real datasets during orchestrator initialization
decisions_log.reason: Eager seeding made first API requests exceed performance targets. Real catalogs are only needed for explicit dataset evaluation contexts.
decisions_log.alternatives_considered: Relax performance tests; preload all datasets at process start; remove real dataset support from the API path

decisions_log.decision: Use an isolated evaluation SQLite database for full runner executions
decisions_log.reason: The default data/memory.db can be readonly or locked in the local Windows environment; evaluation should be reproducible without depending on mutable runtime state.
decisions_log.alternatives_considered: Manually change file permissions; delete data/memory.db; skip ingestion in evaluation

decisions_log.decision: Filter Goodreads book metadata to only book IDs present in the sampled review profiles
decisions_log.reason: The raw books.jsonl file is about 1GB and loading the entire file is unnecessary for processed split generation.
decisions_log.alternatives_considered: Load the entire books file into pandas; skip book metadata joins; require pre-trimmed Goodreads metadata

decisions_log.decision: Normalize Goodreads date parsing with utc=True
decisions_log.reason: Raw Goodreads date strings contain mixed time zones and pandas raises without UTC normalization.
decisions_log.alternatives_considered: Sort only by user_id; drop date parsing; manually parse each timezone

completed: Added cold-start branch to per-source personalized retrieval to prefer affinity-aware popularity

sessions.last_session_summary: Implemented a cold-start fallback, added tuning utilities, ran Task A evaluation, and stabilized the retrieval pipeline for further tuning.

file_module_map.purpose: Full Task B runner updated with cold-start branch and collaborative weight parameter
Small-grid tuning harness to find a good simulation/CF blend and rerun full pipeline
Task A sample benchmark used to run Task A evaluator

decisions_log.decision: Prefer affinity-aware popularity for cold-start users
decisions_log.reason: Avoids returning generic global popularity lists while still surfacing items aligned with inferred affinities
decisions_log.alternatives_considered: Pure popularity baseline; random exploration; ground-truth leakage

decisions_log.decision: Expose collaborative_weight for tuning
decisions_log.reason: Allows controlled blending of simulation-first signals with collaborative priors during ranking
decisions_log.alternatives_considered: Hard-coded blend; tune only via code edits

known_issues.issue: Tuning runs can block or be slow when running large full-evaluation loops via TestClient
known_issues.status: mitigated - tuning grid reduced and CLI sample arg added

known_issues.issue: Observed metric variability: a cold-start change produced lower NDCG on a subsequent full run (NDCG@10 dropped to ~0.020); requires further tuning

errors_encountered.context: Tuning script invoked a full evaluation causing the TestClient to block under heavy load
errors_encountered.resolution: Reduced candidate grid and added CLI sample size argument to tune_and_run.py

test_results.tuning_samples: tune results written to data/evaluation/tune_results_w0.json and tune_results_w10.json (small-sample grid runs)

next_steps: Rerun full Task B with collaborative_weight=0.25 on full samples and collect fresh metrics
Iterate cold-start thresholds and affinity priors to recover and improve NDCG/HitRate
If agreed, perform an automated small-grid search over simulation vs CF weights with early-stopping on small samples
sessions.notes: This session documents the cold-start and tuning additions. The runner and tuning harness are in the repo; next is a controlled full Task B pass to finalize metrics for the solution paper.
